tools.name: brave_web_search
tools.description: Performs a web search using the Brave Search API, ideal for general queries, news, articles, and online content.

tools.name: brave_web_search_code_mode
tools.description: Performs a web search then runs custom JavaScript against the raw API response in a secure QuickJS sandbox. Drastically reduces context window usage.

code.description: JavaScript code to execute against the 'DATA' variable.

language.description: Language of the code. Only 'javascript' is supported.

tools.name: brave_local_search
tools.description: Searches for local businesses and places using Brave's Local Search API. Returns names, addresses, ratings, phone numbers, and opening hours.

query.description: Local search query (e.g. 'pizza near Central Park')

tools.name: brave_local_search_code_mode
tools.description: Performs a local search then runs custom JavaScript against the raw API response in a secure QuickJS sandbox.

code.description: JavaScript code to execute against the 'DATA' variable.

language.description: Language of the code. Only 'javascript' is supported.

tools.name: code_mode_transform
tools.description: Universal code-mode transformer. Takes raw text or JSON from any MCP tool and runs JavaScript in a QuickJS sandbox. Supports pre-built templates: github_issues, github_prs, jira_tickets, dom_links, dom_headings, api_endpoints, slack_messages, csv_summary.

data.description: The raw text or JSON output to process.

code.description: JavaScript code to execute. Optional if using a template.

language.description: Language of the code. Only 'javascript' is supported.

source_tool.description: Optional. Name of the MCP tool that produced the data.

tools.name: brave_answers
tools.description: Returns direct AI answers grounded in Brave Search using Brave AI Grounding. Uses an OpenAI-compatible chat completions endpoint.

model.description: Model name for Brave AI Grounding (default: brave)

tools.name: gemini_research_paper_analysis
tools.description: In-depth analysis of research papers using Google's Gemini-2.0-flash model. Supports summary, critique, literature review, key findings, and comprehensive analysis.

paperContent.description: The full text of the research paper to analyze

additionalContext.description: Optional additional context or questions to guide the analysis

tools.name: session_save_ledger
tools.description: Save an immutable session log entry to the session ledger. Append-only audit trail of all agent work sessions.

summary.description: Brief summary of what was accomplished

tools.name: session_save_handoff
tools.description: Upsert the latest project handoff state for the next session. Supports optimistic concurrency control via expected_version.

open_todos.description: Open TODO items for the next session

active_branch.description: Git branch for the next session

last_summary.description: Summary of the most recent session

key_context.description: Critical context the next session needs

tools.name: session_load_context
tools.description: Load session context for a project using progressive context loading. Levels: quick (~50 tokens), standard (~200 tokens), deep (~1000+ tokens).

tools.name: knowledge_search
tools.description: Search accumulated knowledge across all sessions by keywords, category, or free text. Categories: debugging, architecture, deployment, testing, configuration, api-integration, data-migration, security, performance, documentation, ai-ml, ui-frontend, resume.

tools.name: knowledge_forget
tools.description: Selectively forget (delete) accumulated knowledge entries. Supports forget by project, category, age, or full reset. Supports dry_run preview.

older_than_days.description: Forget entries older than N days

tools.name: session_compact_ledger
tools.description: Auto-compact old session ledger entries by rolling them up into AI-generated summaries using Gemini. Prevents indefinite growth.

tools.name: session_search_memory
tools.description: Search session history semantically using vector embeddings. Finds sessions by meaning, not just keywords. Requires pgvector in Supabase.

tools.name: session_backfill_embeddings
tools.description: Repair ledger entries missing vector embeddings due to temporary API outages. Batch-generates missing embeddings via Gemini.

tools.name: memory_history
tools.description: View the timeline of past memory states for a project. Use before memory_checkout to find the correct version to revert to.

tools.name: memory_checkout
tools.description: Time travel — restores project memory to a specific past version. Non-destructive; the version number moves forward. Call memory_history first.

tools.name: session_save_image
tools.description: Save a local image file into the project's permanent visual memory. Supports png, jpg, jpeg, webp, gif, svg.

tools.name: session_view_image
tools.description: Retrieve an image from visual memory by ID. Returns Base64 inline content for LLM analysis.

image_id.description: Short image ID from visual memory index

prompts.name: resume_session
prompts.description: Load previous session context for a project. Automatically fetches handoff state and injects it before the LLM starts thinking.
